title: Tricopper
content:
{{Top|leg}}
'''Tricopper''' was a metallic substance that was [[Mining/Legends|mined]] on the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] of [[Ord Cestus/Legends|Ord Cestus]]. The refined material was black in [[Color/Legends|color]].

==Behind the scenes==
The mineral may have been related to [[Copper/Legends|copper]].

==Appearances==
*''[[Star Wars: The Old Republic: Rise of the Hutt Cartel]]''
*''[[Darth Bane: Path of Destruction]]'' {{Ab|Darth Bane: Path of Destruction (audiobook)}} {{Mo}}
*''[[The Cestus Deception]]''
*[[Star Wars: Clone Wars Adventures (video game)|''Star Wars: Clone Wars Adventures'']]

[[Category:Metals]]
